case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROLANDO H MARTINELLI

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINELLI, ROLANDO H , AN INDIVIDUAL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200018797)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200005092) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-27-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
